character.definition: (same as 媵) (in old time) a maid who accompanies a bride to her new home; to escort, a concubine
a goddess's name in legend; the sister and successor of Fu Xi 伏羲, (interchangeable 庖), last name
to cook; to boil; to stew
efficacious, effectiveness; to toil, to serve in the army
a bank, a brink. a shore, a beach
(variant of 鴟) kite, horned owl; wine cups
the sound made by breathing in; oh! (see ㄛ BOPOMOFO LETTER O)
